title: Iran’s Security Establishment Celebrates Mojtaba Khamenei’s Selection
summary_full: Opponents of the government, however, worried the new supreme leader, a son of the recently killed Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, would rule with an iron fist like his father.
summary_public: Opponents of the government, however, worried the new supreme leader, a son of the recently killed Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, would rule with an iron fist like his father.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: rule with an iron fist like his father.
